why: blast medium on a frozen instrument suite; the two doctrine rules (#254/#255) are additive prose to a non-frozen SKILL.md and self-assertable, but every structure/selection correction to the frozen .feature is a mixed edit routing to Clearance, and each forces a threshold re-derivation that is a policy call the owner owns
approach: re-measure all seven against main before scoping; a brief's list of broken things is a past measurement
close #253 as absorbed (extract-situation withholds the scenario name — measured by running the engine, not read)
close #250 as superseded: cohesion is non-substitutable, so the boolean is terminal and the remnant ask is now illegal
state the two missing doctrine rules ABSTRACTLY — no worked example, no probe apparatus, else the fix creates absorption
prove every dead-weight claim by ABLATION (delete the rule, re-score), never by the miss test or a mean against a correct subject
run controls that must survive, derived from this suite; the operator.feature control named by earlier briefs is stale and inverted
batch #249 and the Clearance shape to the owner; never self-assert a frozen narrowing

summary: catches-misalignment is unloseable — its Given states the product direction three times, so the dimension grades reading comprehension rather than the doctrine. Measured delta=0 across an example-stripped ablation with and without an inference rule. Fix is a frozen Given re-cut, routing to Clearance.

disjoint-nodes-not-fused is unloseable — its Given plants no over-merge temptation, and the SSA framing makes one-node-one-Mission the default read. Measured delta=0 with the anti-fuse rule and screaming placement ablated whole. Fix is a frozen Given re-cut on the regroup scenario, routing to Clearance.

@trigger outlines freeze a cross-node property the node does not own (description prose x harness x sibling set); the negative rows are sibling-deference claims about other nodes' descriptions and can go stale invisibly; the rate-based instrument that should own this has never been run, with zero query corpora in the repo. Corpus-wide, wants its own node.

The double-barreled class reaches beyond the persona suites already tracked — 5 more dimensions across ssa-lowering, spec-anchors and manage-skill-dirs. The existing issue's not-a-false-green scope note does not transfer: ssa-lowering's fused dimensions have no boolean backstop, so a violated half can still clear the threshold. Manufactured by folding B into A to escape unloseable dimensions.

Contradicts this mission's own completion claim that the suite would be left a sound instrument for the capstone. Nine of eleven @rubric scenarios remain unablated and are unfalsified rather than earned; both dimensions probed came back dead, and every remaining repair routes to Clearance with owner-held threshold policy calls. The capstone's premise that this suite is sound is not established by this mission.
